sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55606" key="kataxlaino/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταχλαινόω</orth>, <sense id="n55606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clothe with a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χλαῖνα</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
